/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/MainEngine.dir/main.cpp.o -o MainEngine  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sfml/3.0.1/lib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sfml/3.0.1/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sfml/3.0.1/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sfml/3.0.1/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.1.dylib
